subcodes.title: Talk to pilgrims at Haifa pilgrim house, 1914-10-23
subcodes.first_line: The best hour to eat supper is right after sunset... During the life of my grandfather, the Ministers of State had an established custom
subcodes.first_line_orig: باید شام بعد از غروب حاضر باشد هر وقت میل دارند بخورند بهترین اوقات
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @stories; anecdotes, @principle of balance; moderation; equilibrium
